description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a single, continuous seat and backrest upholstered in a vibrant teal fabric. The backrest is gently angled and curves smoothly into the seat, providing ergonomic support without any visible segmentation or decorative elements. The seat is wide and flat, offering ample space for lounging, and the upholstery appears to be a solid, smooth fabric with no visible patterns or tufting. The chaise is supported by four slender, slightly splayed legs made of dark-colored metal, giving it a light and airy appearance. There are no armrests, emphasizing the open and accessible design. The overall look is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor settings.
description: A modern teal chaise with a smooth, continuous seat and backrest, supported by four slender dark metal legs and no armrests. The design is sleek, minimalist, and ideal for contemporary urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat seat and gently curved backrest, highlighting the chaise's open and inviting design.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the chaise's angled backrest and the slim, splayed legs, emphasizing its ergonomic profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unsegmented backrest and the symmetrical placement of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the continuous seat-to-backrest transition and the absence of armrests.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, gently angled, and smoothly curved, forming a continuous surface with the seat. It is unsegmented and lacks any decorative elements or tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side, giving the chaise an open and accessible appearance.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, straight, and slightly splayed, constructed from dark-colored metal with a smooth finish and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid teal color with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, integrated cushion that forms both the seat and backrest, with no separate or loose cushions visible.
